reviews.review_description: thank you for bringing us joy i know there's thousands of haters that hate on this game because it's a gorilla tag fan gaming people keep on calling it a copy of it but really it's a separate thing on its own that deserves a lot more attention and more people need to play gonk and to you owner enjoy your life☺️
I was playing and I was super laggy, the hand taps were so annoying, and It's only a square. I not trying to be mean but.

Do you know someone named “B” because thats me, im only tryna use the apk for GOOD purposes, and Popgt (moderator) gave me it, and the person named “bob” that sounds like a little kid is my friend (zizo) and they’re an apk but you let zizo be a mod anyway! (I think you did idk) but if you did that is absolute favoritism, overall its a good game, 5 stars

reviews.review_title: I'm the owner and I'm fixing the lag
reviews.review_description: By the ramp don't look that way until i fix it

So good and it is funny how when you complete the horror maze you jump down and see a gorilla on tv and I like how you get kicked . Cosmetics are FREE😱🥶very colds 100,000,000,000,000+Aura so I agree it is so much better
What gorilla tag could have been your nothing but lag
I can't even play because of tue god danm lag.
No this game is not good, it has toxic players a moderator kicked me for no reason and the updates never come out NEVER
I’m the owner by technical issue but we want you to have fun. REMEBER THIS IS ONLY BETA we hope you have fun seeing how everyone is mad it’s ok we can speak

I was playing till everyone said I was “glitching” out the map and I rejoined and the moderator said I was gonna be BANNED PERMANENTLY and he said he gave me a warning and said that the amount of times you glitch out the map the weeks or days you be banned but HE NEVER SAID THAT this is not fair I demand a unban I did nothing wrong Also I put my name as the f word cuz I was so mad at the moderators I don’t have discord plz unban me and when I load in the game I can’t even see there’s a tunnel with a room fix your game and unban me
I met the creator and the co-owner on the first day when I got the game they were very nice,funny,kind!!!!
The game is great and I can’t wait to see how good it gets
The games is fun but a modoretor kick me force no reson but the game is cool
I have been playing since November 2 2023 and I have been trying for so long but I have never gotten the chance to
It's been quite awhile but I'm the tophat gang leader. A few months back u said I could have mod, but I never got it. Can I still have a chance to get mod?? I will make more videos on this game!

reviews.review_title: Ex big scary mod/dev willing to help!
reviews.review_description: I have worked with big scary for a long time and have retired and I'm willing to help you, I created a few levels and cosmetics so I have experience. (Add me to hit me up)
I am berry I am a mod it is a fun and great game once you play by the rules and get to know the community it is really fun to play
It's really good so far just a bit more an it will be perfect
Although it lagged a bit when I spawned it was still a very good game and I hope it does good in the future.It is almost better than gorilla tag in my opinion :)
